👂 ENT SolutionsREF: MRL-ENT-003-6FBF

Bi-Valve Nasal Splints

· Nasal Devices

Two-valve design nasal splints with suture holes for precise placement and structural support. Designed for post-surgical recovery and trauma management with enhanced fixation capabilities.

MaterialMedical-grade silicone
Frequently Asked Questions

Two-valve design nasal splints with suture holes for precise placement and structural support. Designed for post-surgical recovery and trauma management with enhanced fixation capabilities.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Bi-Valve Nasal Splints, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Bi-Valve Nasal Splints is constructed using Medical-grade silicone, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
